name_cn:
High Version
New Coconut Tree Light Blue Small Size
DIOR Book Tote Shopping Bag
Larger than mini size, slightly smaller than the original small size
The vintage D-letter embroidery that swept the fashion world
Fully handcrafted 3D embroidery, textured and raised
Rich vintage artistic atmosphere, simply a walking work of art
Super large capacity, it's amazing
Especially suitable for girls who want to take their whole home out
Mom bag, briefcase, travel companion
Must-have for fashionistas to style their look
26.5×21×14cm
